data.body: B5 cutover note from B3's code review: the completion_verdict is produced inside a branch ARM (reconcile/passthrough), so it is NOT on RunResult.terminal_output (which is the branch's {taken: arm}) nor in RunResult.outputs (top-level ids only). The verdict lives at the nested frame key (decide@then/reconcile | decide@else/passthrough) in the recorder/event log. B5 must either teach run_workflow to surface the executed-arm terminal output on RunResult, or add a gate-side helper that extracts the terminal arm's completion_verdict from the run record, before wiring the close gate to the workflow path.
